qa-fp-task-groupby.notes: BUG: groupBy does not skip items with null/undefined keys. At lib/transforms.js:44-51, null/undefined keys are coerced to string keys 'null'/'undefined' instead of being excluded. Fix: add a guard (key == null) continue before grouping.

qa-fp-task-slugify.notes: All criteria met: simple strings, multiple spaces, special chars, and empty string all handled correctly

qa-fp-task-truncate.notes: All criteria met: truncation with ellipsis, no-truncation for short/exact strings, empty string handled

qa-fp-task-unique.notes: All criteria met: deduplicates numbers and strings, preserves first-occurrence order, empty array handled

qa-fp-task-flatten.notes: All criteria met: depth-1 default, Infinity depth, empty array, and depth-0 all work correctly
